name: SYS 03 — Pre-Call Diagnostic Brief
description: Triggered by a Cal.com booking, sends an intake form to the prospect, waits 24 hours for a response, then uses AI to generate a pre-call diagnostic brief delivered as a Google Doc and emailed to John before the call.

parameters.subject: Quick prep for our call, {{ $json.firstName }} (takes 3 min)
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.firstName }},

Looking forward to our call on {{ $json.formattedDate }}.

To make sure we use the time well, I put together 6 quick questions. Your answers help me walk in with specific ideas for your situation — not a generic pitch.

It takes about 3 minutes:

👉 Complete your pre-call prep here

If you'd rather just talk through it live, no worries — we'll cover it on the call.

See you soon,
John Schibelli
Founder, IntraWeb Technologies
intrawebtech.com

parameters.subject: One quick thing before our call, {{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.firstName }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.firstName }},

Just a quick nudge — our call is coming up and I want to make sure I have enough context to be genuinely useful to you.

👉 Complete your 3-minute prep form here

No pressure if you'd rather just wing it — I'll see you on the call either way.

John

values.content:
You are a senior AI transformation consultant at IntraWeb Technologies. IntraWeb helps mid-market companies ($10M-$100M revenue, 10-150 employees) implement AI that delivers real ROI — not pilots that fail. Your $10,000 diagnostic assessment identifies the highest-leverage automation opportunities in a business. Your $8,000/month retainer implements them.

Your core message: 95% of AI pilots fail to deliver ROI. IntraWeb fixes that through a human-in-the-loop implementation approach.

Generate a pre-call diagnostic brief for John Schibelli to review before a discovery call. Be specific, sharp, and avoid generic consulting language. Focus on business impact and ROI framing.

parameters.subject: 🔥 Pre-Call Brief Ready: {{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.fullName }} — {{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.formattedDate }}
parameters.message:
Your pre-call diagnostic brief is ready.

Prospect{{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.fullName }}
Email{{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.email }}
Call Time{{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.formattedDate }}
Form Submitted{{ $('📄 Assemble Brief').first().json.formSubmitted ? '✅ Yes' : '⚠️ No — brief generated from booking data only' }}
Meeting Link{{ $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.meetingUrl }}

📄 Open Full Diagnostic Brief in Google Docs

{{ $('📄 Assemble Brief').first().json.briefText }}

Generated by IntraWeb n8n automation

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '📋 *Pre-Call Brief Ready*

*Prospect:* ' + $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.fullName + '
*Call:* ' + $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.formattedDate + '
*Form submitted:* ' + ($('📄 Assemble Brief').first().json.formSubmitted ? '✅ Yes' : '⚠️ No') + '

📄 Brief sent to your inbox.' }) }}

parameters.content:
## SYS 03 — Pre-Call Diagnostic Brief

**Webhook:** POST https://n8n.intrawebtech.com/webhook/intraweb-cal-booking

**Trigger:** Cal.com fires when prospect books a Discovery Call.

**Flow:**
1. Parse booking data (name, email, time, meeting link)
2. Upsert HubSpot contact (SW — Create or Update HubSpot Contact)
3. Send intake form email to prospect
4. Wait 24hrs for form response
5. Check Google Sheets for submission
6. Branch:
   - Form submitted: Generate AI brief (GPT-4o) -> Google Doc -> Email + Chat alert -> Log
   - No response: Send nudge email -> Log

**Downstream handoffs:**
- HubSpot upsert: SW — Create or Update HubSpot Contact (email, firstName, lastName)
- Logging: SW — Log to Automations Log Sheet (brief_generated / nudge_sent)
- Google Chat: inline alert to team space

**System position:**
- Upstream: SYS 02 — ElevenLabs Post-Call Handler booked branch (Cal.com booking auto-triggers this)
- Downstream: SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery (after discovery call)
- CRM: HubSpot contact created/updated on booking

**Before activating:**
1. Replace YOUR_TYPEFORM_URL in both email nodes
2. Connect Google Sheets (set spreadsheet ID for form responses)
3. Set Cal.com webhook to POST to this workflow's production URL
4. Connect Google Docs credentials

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Create or Update HubSpot Contact

value.customProps: ={{ JSON.stringify({ booking_uid: $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.bookingUid, last_booking_date: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet

value.notes: ={{ 'Pre-call brief generated for ' + $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.fullName + ' — call on ' + $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.formattedDate }}

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet

value.notes: ={{ 'Intake form nudge sent to ' + $('📋 Parse Booking Data').first().json.email + ' — form not submitted within 24hrs' }}
